title: Ores Glowing: Additional
description: Ores from other mods now glow!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d831a1fd6e84c1a6c95201b3a9ff7f1e79ac6e7.png)

**Are you having trouble finding ores from other mods in caves? Use this resource pack!**

_if you need [vanilla ores](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ores-glowing)_

### Optifine must be installed for the resource pack to work!

### Supported mods:

*   Ad Astra
*   Big Reactors
*   Create
*   Draconic Evolution
*   Immersive Engineering
*   Mekanism
*   Powah
*   Thermal Expansion

**There will be more mods in the future!**

Below are screenshots of some ores/mines:

![cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7a9cc18d913e32cbfb7f72b66c8fd05481da209_0.webp)

![cave2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3b545a708006aa11b2c39410591c35ea27bf844_0.webp)
